description: Hugging Face Kazakh datasets manifest. Curated list of legitimately-licensed Kazakh-language datasets hosted on Hugging Face. Each entry is one file (CSV, parquet, JSON) downloadable by direct URL. `scripts/fetch_huggingface_kazakh.sh` reads this and downloads any entry where `url` is non-empty and `sha256` is null (or mismatches the on-disk file).
license_policy: Only entries with Apache-2.0, MIT, CC-0, CC-BY-* licenses. No CC-BY-NC (incompatible with downstream commercial use), no licenses without redistribution clause. Each entry records its license in the `license` field — keep it accurate.

sources.title: MDBKD kazakhBooks split — Kazakh-language books (literature + educational + reference)
sources.notes: Primary book corpus. Largest unstructured Kazakh-text source we'll ingest. Expect literary + educational + reference text.

sources.title: MDBKD kazakhNews split — Kazakh news articles
sources.notes: Contemporary news language. Useful for domain coverage but lower priority than books.

sources.title: MDBKD leipzig split — Leipzig Corpora Collection Kazakh
sources.notes: Mixed-source corpus from Leipzig Corpora Collection. We already have cc100 + wiki separately, so this is redundant unless we need extra volume.

sources.title: KazCulture — 16 137 passage-question-answer triplets from 11 Kazakh culture books
sources.notes: Evaluation dataset (passage-QA). TODO: get the exact resolve URL — HF page is https://huggingface.co/datasets/issai/KazCulture

sources.title: Kazakh Unified National Testing (ЕНТ) multiple-choice benchmark
sources.notes: Real ЕНТ test items. Useful for tutor positioning evaluation. TODO: get exact resolve URL.

sources.title: KazParC — parallel corpus Kazakh × English/Russian/Turkish
sources.notes: Aligned parallel corpus. Future use: translation pretraining. TODO: confirm URL — repo at https://github.com/IS2AI/KazParC
